data.current_description: Execute various actions including retrieving recent leads, subscribing to webhooks, or unsubscribing from webhooks
data.summary_suggestion: Perform lead retrieval or webhook subscription management
data.description_suggestion: Executes one of three distinct actions based on the action parameter: (1) Retrieve recent leads - fetches an array of recent leads from the CRM; (2) Subscribe to webhooks - registers a webhook URL to receive real-time lead notifications; (3) Unsubscribe from webhooks - removes an existing webhook subscription. Requires zapierKey authentication. Returns action-specific response objects (LeadsResponse, SubscribeResponse, or UnsubscribeResponse). Webhook subscriptions persist until explicitly unsubscribed.
